subcodes.first_line: O cherished remembrance of that glorious friend! Knowest thou how, at the mere mention of thy name, the memory of that joy-giving one hath come to mind at this moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن یار بزرگوار هیچ دانی که الان به مناسبت ذکر تو چگونه بیاد آنسرور
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @exhortations and counsels, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
